info.title: SaaS Boilerplate API
info.description: Organisation-first SaaS boilerplate API. v0.18.1 adds Platform Owner Admin UI screens for global organisation management, plan assignment, global plan catalogue management, cross-tenant audit/security visibility and system readiness while preserving the v0.17.0 Organisation Owner UI.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Login, current user, logout, token context and public authentication discovery APIs.

tags.name: Organisations
tags.description: Organisation records and tenant profile APIs.

tags.name: RBAC
tags.description: Roles, permissions and access-control catalogue APIs.

tags.name: Tokens
tags.description: Personal access tokens, organisation API tokens and token policy metadata.

tags.name: Branding
tags.description: Organisation branding, public theme and branding asset APIs.

tags.name: SSO
tags.description: OIDC/SSO configuration, discovery and login-flow APIs.

tags.name: MFA
tags.description: Organisation MFA policy and public MFA-policy discovery APIs.

tags.name: Features
tags.description: Feature catalogue and organisation feature entitlement APIs.

tags.name: Plans
tags.description: Plan catalogue, plan assignment and subscription-readiness APIs.

tags.name: Audit
tags.description: Organisation and platform audit log visibility APIs.

tags.name: Security
tags.description: Organisation and platform security event visibility APIs.

tags.name: Tenant Security
tags.description: Tenant-level auth configuration and security controls.

tags.name: Platform Admin
tags.description: Platform-level administrative APIs requiring platform permissions.

tags.name: Developer/System
tags.description: Health, schema and OpenAPI/developer support APIs.

UserSessionAuth.description: Short-lived logged-in user token used by the frontend and Postman during development.

PersonalAccessTokenAuth.description: Long-lived user-owned scoped token for Postman, scripts and user automation.

OrganisationApiTokenAuth.description: Organisation-owned token for external/system-to-system integrations. Uses external audience and external:* scopes.

ServiceAccountTokenAuth.description: Reserved for later service identity requirements.

get.description: Returns API and MongoDB connection status. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Returns 200 when the API process is alive. Does not require MongoDB. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Returns 200 only when the API is ready to receive traffic and MongoDB is connected. Returns 503 when not ready. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Interactive Swagger/OpenAPI documentation route mounted under /api/docs. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Raw OpenAPI JSON document route mounted under /api/openapi.json. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Returns safe public login configuration by organisation slug or domain. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.

200.description: Get public organisation login branding succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public organisation theme and branding tokens. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Serves active provider-backed branding FileAsset images for public login/theme rendering. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.
Serves legacy v0.7.1 local development branding assets for backwards compatibility. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.

200.description: Get legacy public branding asset succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public native/SSO auth options. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.

200.description: Get public organisation auth options succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public MFA policy hints for login screens. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.

200.description: Get public organisation MFA policy succeeded.

get.description: Returns safe public SSO options for future OIDC/SAML login screens. Authentication required: none. Classification: public-safe metadata only.

200.description: Get public organisation SSO options succeeded.

post.description: Authenticates an organisation-owned native user and returns a user_session_token. Authentication required: none. Classification: public auth entry point.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns current authenticated user, organisation, roles and permissions. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: auth:me. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Acknowledges logout for stateless local bearer token usage. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: auth:me. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns token type, audience, scopes and MFA-aware token metadata. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.policy.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Builds an OIDC authorization-code + PKCE request for the selected organisation and redirects to the provider. Add ?redirect=false to return the authorization URL as JSON. Authentication required: none. Classification: public OIDC start route.

302.description: Redirect to OIDC provider authorization endpoint.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Completes OIDC authorization-code + PKCE login, exchanges the code, validates the RS256 id_token, provisions or updates the user, applies group-role mapping and returns a user_session_token. Authentication required: none. Classification: public OIDC callback route.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.summary: Complete OIDC SSO callback from SPA
post.description: POST variant of the OIDC callback for clients that capture code/state and complete the exchange via JSON. Authentication required: none. Classification: public OIDC callback route.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Builds or redirects to the configured OIDC provider logout endpoint. Authentication required: none; local bearer tokens remain stateless and must be discarded by the client. Classification: public OIDC logout helper.

302.description: Redirect to OIDC provider logout endpoint.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns global permission catalogue. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: permissions.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns model/index/collection status for the internal MongoDB schema foundation. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: internal.schema.view. Tenant scope: developer/system. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists platform organisations. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.view. Tenant scope: platform. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Creates a platform organisation. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage. Tenant scope: platform. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns one organisation by id. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.view. Tenant scope: platform. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

patch.description: Updates organisation profile/domain metadata. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage. Tenant scope: platform. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

Tenant scope: platform. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists audit logs for the authenticated organisation. Supports page, limit, action, resource_type, actor_user_id, from and to query filters. Scope: organisation. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns one audit log that belongs to the authenticated organisation. Scope: organisation. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists audit logs across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.platform.view. Tenant scope: platform. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

get.description: Returns one audit log across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: audit.platform.view. Tenant scope: platform. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

get.description: Lists audit logs for a selected organisation when the caller has platform audit visibility. Scope: platform. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. 403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists security events across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. get.description: Returns one security event across organisations for platform administrators. Scope: platform. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. get.description: Lists security events for a selected organisation when the caller has platform security visibility. Scope: platform. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: security.events.platform.view. Tenant scope: platform. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

200.description: List platform organisation security events succeeded.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns SaaS plan catalogue, feature defaults and limits. No payment gateway is active in v0.9.1. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Creates/updates a plan catalogue item for subscription readiness. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Create or upsert plan created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns one plan catalogue item. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Update plan by key created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns the authenticated organisation's plan assignment, effective limits and feature readiness metadata. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns plan assignment for a requested organisation. Also requires platform.organisations.view in the route guard. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

patch.description: Assigns a plan and optionally applies plan feature defaults and limits. Also requires platform.organisations.manage in the route guard. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Applies assigned plan feature defaults and limits to the organisation. Also requires platform.organisations.manage in the route guard. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: plans.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Apply organisation plan defaults created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists file assets for the authenticated organisation. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Uploads a base64 file payload through the configured storage provider. Local storage is used by default; Azure Blob/Azurite can be selected with STORAGE_PROVIDER=azure_blob. Requires feature: file_uploads and plan file/storage limit checks. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.upload. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Returns file metadata for one organisation-owned file. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

delete.description: Archives an organisation-owned file asset while keeping metadata for auditability. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.delete. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Downloads one active organisation-owned file through the configured storage provider. Requires feature: file_uploads. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: files.view. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists current user's personal access tokens. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Creates a user-owned long-lived scoped token. Raw token is returned once. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Create personal access token created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

delete.description: Revokes a user-owned personal access token. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Revoke personal access token created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Lists organisation-owned external integration tokens. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Internal/external classification is now endpoint metadata, not the Swagger group.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

post.description: Creates an organisation-owned external integration token. Raw token is returned once. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Create organisation API token created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

patch.description: Updates organisation API token status. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

200.description: Update organisation API token status succeeded.

201.description: Update organisation API token status created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

delete.description: Revokes an organisation API token. Authentication required: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage. Tenant scope: organisation. Mutating/sensitive routes should write audit or security events where applicable.

201.description: Revoke organisation API token created resource.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error

get.description: Validates an organisation_api_token and returns external token context. Authentication required: OrganisationApiTokenAuth. Required scope: external:organisation.read. Classification: external system-to-system. Tenant scope: organisation.

403.description: Permission, scope or tenant isolation error
